lines.speaker: Apprentice workman
lines.text: Sorry, I haven't got time to chat. We've only just finished a collossal order of furniture for the Varrock area, and already there's more work coming in.

lines.speaker: Apprentice workman
lines.text: Yeah, the Council's had it redecorated.

lines.speaker: Workman
lines.text: - Oi - stop gabbing and get that chair finished!

lines.speaker: Apprentice workman
lines.text: You'd better let me get on with my work.
